message: WriteRole not configured. Add WriteRole in account settings.
impact_summary: All new EBS volumes in this region will be encrypted by default.

blocked_reasons: AWS account metadata was not found for this action.
resolution.decision_rationale: Wave 2 compatibility defaulted to the single compatible profile 'ebs_enable_default_encryption_aws_managed_kms' for strategy 'ebs_enable_default_encryption_aws_managed_kms'. Blocking checks: AWS account metadata was not found for this action..
